name: explain-config
description: Agent-first JSON: effective config value and winning layer for a dotted path.

name: resolve-config
description: Agent-first JSON: full effective config (sorted) and merge layer ids.

name: resolve-agent-guidance
description: Effective agent guidance tier (RPG party v1), labels, and behavioral hints — advisory only.

name: set-agent-guidance
description: Persist kit.agentGuidance tier (1–5) to project config; optional interactive picker.

name: document-project
description: Generate all project docs from templates to .ai and docs/maintainers surfaces.

name: generate-document
description: Generate a single document by type for .ai and docs/maintainers surfaces.

name: list-behavior-profiles
description: List builtin and custom behavior profile ids.

name: get-behavior-profile
description: Get one behavior profile by id (resolved).

name: resolve-behavior-profile
description: Effective profile + provenance for the workspace.

name: set-active-behavior-profile
description: Set or clear the workspace active behavior profile.

name: create-behavior-profile
description: Create a custom profile, optionally forked from a base.

name: update-behavior-profile
description: Patch a custom behavior profile.

name: delete-behavior-profile
description: Delete a custom behavior profile.

name: diff-behavior-profiles
description: Structured diff of two profiles.

name: explain-behavior-profiles
description: Deterministic markdown summary or compare.

name: interview-behavior-profile
description: Guided interview to draft a custom profile.

name: run-transition
description: Execute a validated task status transition.

name: create-task
description: Create a new task through validated task-engine persistence.

name: update-task
description: Update mutable task fields without lifecycle bypass.

name: update-wishlist
description: Update mutable fields on an open Wishlist item.

name: update-workspace-phase-snapshot
description: Update current_kit_phase and/or next_kit_phase in docs/maintainers/data/workspace-kit-status.yaml (atomic write).

name: archive-task
description: Archive a task without destructive deletion.

name: add-dependency
description: Add a dependency edge between tasks with cycle checks.

name: assign-task-phase
description: Set task phaseKey and phase label (maintainer bucket) without generic update-task.

name: remove-dependency
description: Remove a dependency edge between tasks.

name: replay-queue-snapshot
description: Read-only replay of get-next-actions against frozen tasks from JSON (no live store writes).

name: get-dependency-graph
description: Get dependency graph data for one task or the full store.

name: get-task-history
description: Get transition and mutation history for a task.

name: get-recent-task-activity
description: List recent transition and mutation activity across tasks.

name: get-task-summary
description: Get aggregate task-state summary for active tasks.

name: get-blocked-summary
description: Get blocked-task dependency summary for active tasks.

name: create-task-from-plan
description: Promote planning output into a canonical task.

name: clear-task-phase
description: Remove phase and phaseKey from a task.

name: convert-wishlist
description: Convert a Wishlist item into one or more phased tasks and close the wishlist item.

name: create-wishlist
description: Create a Wishlist ideation item with strict required fields (separate namespace from tasks).

name: get-wishlist
description: Retrieve a single Wishlist item by ID.

name: get-task
description: Retrieve a single task by ID.

name: list-tasks
description: List tasks with optional status/phase filters.

name: list-components
description: List feature-registry component rows (relational taxonomy).

name: list-features
description: List feature-registry feature rows; optional componentId filter.

name: backfill-task-feature-links
description: Copy legacy features_json slugs into task_engine_task_features; clear legacy column.

name: export-feature-taxonomy-json
description: Export registry to documentation data feature-taxonomy.json (schema-validated).

name: list-wishlist
description: List Wishlist items (ideation-only; not part of task execution queues).

name: get-ready-queue
description: Get ready tasks sorted by priority.

name: get-next-actions
description: Get prioritized next-action suggestions with blocking analysis.

name: queue-git-alignment
description: Read-only heuristic: git HEAD vs last task transition; stale in_progress hints (merge ≠ complete guardian).

name: queue-health
description: Read-only audit: ready queue phase alignment vs canonical phase and dependency blocking.

name: migrate-task-persistence
description: Import legacy task + wishlist JSON into SQLite (json-to-sqlite / json-to-unified-sqlite); sqlite-to-json removed in v0.40.

name: get-kit-persistence-map
description: Read-only JSON map of unified SQLite paths, planning table/columns, and legacy import file locations for agents.

name: migrate-wishlist-intake
description: One-time migration: legacy wishlist rows become wishlist_intake tasks; SQLite planning drops the wishlist JSON column.

name: backup-planning-sqlite
description: Online backup of the planning SQLite DB via better-sqlite3 (preferred over raw file copy under write load).

name: list-module-states
description: List unified SQLite module-state rows for diagnostics and migration verification.

name: get-module-state
description: Read one module-state row from unified SQLite storage.

name: dashboard-summary
description: Stable JSON cockpit summary for UI clients (tasks + maintainer status snapshot).

name: explain-task-engine-model
description: Explain model variants, planning boundaries, lifecycle transitions, and required fields.

name: review-item
description: Review and record an approval decision.

name: build-plan
description: Generate a dependency-aware execution plan.

name: list-planning-types
description: List supported planning workflow types and their intent.

name: explain-planning-rules
description: Explain effective planning defaults and rule packs for a workflow type.

name: generate-recommendations
description: Produce evidence-backed workflow recommendations.

name: query-lineage
description: Reconstruct lineage chain for a recommendation task id.

name: sync-transcripts
description: Sync local transcript JSONL files into the archive.

name: ingest-transcripts
description: Run transcript sync and recommendation generation in one flow.

name: transcript-automation-status
description: Emit stable JSON status for transcript sync, ingest, and retry queue.

name: list-subagents
description: List subagent definitions in kit SQLite (user_version 6+).

name: get-subagent
description: Get one subagent definition by id.

name: list-subagent-sessions
description: List subagent sessions with optional filters.

name: get-subagent-session
description: Get one session and its message log.

name: register-subagent
description: Create or update a subagent definition (allowedCommands, metadata).

name: retire-subagent
description: Retire a subagent definition (no new sessions).

name: spawn-subagent
description: Record a subagent session (spawn provenance); host executes separately.

name: message-subagent
description: Append an inbound/outbound/system message to a session.

name: close-subagent-session
description: Close a subagent session.

name: list-skills
description: List discovered skill packs under configured skill roots (Claude-shaped SKILL.md trees).

name: inspect-skill
description: Inspect one skill pack by id (manifest fields + instruction body preview).

name: apply-skill
description: Resolve SKILL.md instructions for a pack; optional audit append when not in dry-run preview mode.

name: recommend-skills
description: Deterministic skill recommendations from tags / phase / task-type filters.
